headline: Leidos and DHL form alliance to strengthen the future of UK Defence logistics
summary: Leidos (NYSE: LDOS) and DHL Supply Chain have formed a strategic alliance to bring integrated, resilient and scalable logistics capabilities aligned to the UK Ministry of Defence's (MOD) Future Defence Support Services (FDSS) programme.
